title: olearia angulata
intro: Olearia angulata, also known as the angled tree daisy or New Zealand tree daisy, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. The leaves and flowers of Olearia angulata have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Olearia angulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its potential to soothe sore throats and calm digestive issues.
